title: SPECIAL ORDER IN CRIMINAL PROCEDURE:  PLEA AGREEMENT
author: Saydullo Ne'matillayevich Azimov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article provides a short analysis of the institute of Plea Agreement, which was introduced into the Criminal Procedure Code of Republic of Uzbekistan, as well as analysis of problems that may occur when applying the said institute, suggestions of solutions of such problems are also put forward in the article.
steps_raw: This article provides a short analysis of the institute of Plea Agreement, which was introduced into the Criminal Procedure Code of Republic of Uzbekistan, as well as analysis of problems that may occur when applying the said institute, suggestions of solutions of such problems are also put forward in the article.
keywords: plea agreement, simplified procedure, petition, prosecutor, accused, court hearing
